extract: Protect (Japanese: まもる Protect) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM17 from Generation II to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, as well as in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. TM07 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM25 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM007 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
